body:
Minimal Flower Pot – Color Variant Series (16x, Java)

A minimal flower pot texture series for Minecraft Java Edition (16x).
Each project changes only the flower pot texture using a single clean color.
Designed to be lightweight, vanilla-friendly, and suitable for PvP or minimalist builds.

Technical Info:
- Game: Minecraft Java
- Resolution: 16x
- Modified: Flower Pot only
- No mods required
